title: Project Dyson Research: simulation code, data, and manuscripts for a Dyson swarm
description:
Simulation code, analysis scripts, research data, and manuscripts for the Project Dyson publication series — an open, multi-model AI-consensus engineering-planning program for a Dyson swarm. Includes Monte-Carlo economic models (ISRU crossover), packet-level TDMA / NS-3 swarm-coordination simulations, multi-model deliberation analyses, and the controlled-baseline, repeated-trial, and ablation datasets supporting the manuscripts.

Reproducibility: analysis code lives under publications/scripts/ with pinned dependencies in requirements.txt; regenerating a paper's figures runs the corresponding generate_*_figures.py against the archived data. The Project Dyson interactive web platform is a separate, GPL-3.0 repository.
